hyperedges.label: Unlarp CLI command surface (config, setup, use, connect/exec, sync, tunnel)
Coolify named volumes mapped to workspace container paths

nodes.label: Three-way Reconciliation algorithm
nodes.rationale: Used so file sync does not require SSHFS or FUSE kernel extensions on macOS; a local state history enables 3-way reconciliation between local, remote and last-known-synced state, propagating edits via SFTP in milliseconds.

nodes.label: Onboarding Wizard
nodes.rationale: Runs automatically when no host is configured in ~/.unlarp.yaml, guiding the user step-by-step to register connection details and inject the SSH public key with visual feedback, so first-time setup requires no manual config editing.

nodes.label: Tmux Session Persistence (Claude Code / Agentes)
nodes.rationale: Remote Tmux sessions persist code agents across disconnects; Ctrl+G detaches without killing the remote process, and SIGWINCH propagation keeps the remote terminal sized correctly to avoid layout breaks.

nodes.label: SSH config import (--from-ssh-config)
nodes.rationale: Read-only import from ~/.ssh/config lets users reuse existing SSH aliases without modifying the original ssh config file.
